label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which book Dave ends up with at the end of the semester. There are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book. The problem gives a sequence of trades, and I need to track each trade step by step to determine Dave's final book. First, let me list out the initial books each person has: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, the trades happen in a specific order. Let me go through each trade one by one and keep track of who has which book after each swap. First trade: Claire and Bob swap books. So before this trade: - Claire has The Fellowship of the Ring - Bob has Ulysses After swapping: - Claire now has Ulysses - Bob now has The Fellowship of the Ring Second trade: Claire and Dave swap books. At this point, Claire has Ulysses, and Dave has Lolita (from the initial setup, unless there was a prior trade involving Dave. Wait, the first trade was Claire and Bob, so Dave hasn't traded yet. So yes, Dave still has Lolita. Now Claire and Dave swap. After this swap: - Claire gives Ulysses to Dave, so Dave now has Ulysses. - Dave gives Lolita to Claire, so Claire now has Lolita. So after second trade: - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Ulysses Third trade: Dave and Alice swap books. Before
